title: About this project
description: Learn what this Ring-powered project is, who it serves, how to get started, and where to find the publisher behind the platform.

hero.title: About this project
hero.description: This site runs on Ring — an open-source platform for communities, opportunities, and marketplaces. Here is what this project is building and how you can take part.

origin.title: How it started
origin.subtitle: From idea to living platform
origin.content: Every Ring clone begins with a clear need: connect people, surface opportunities, and run day-to-day collaboration in one place. This project packages those capabilities for its own community — tuned through ring-config.json and your own content, without vendor lock-in.

founders.title: Who is behind the platform
founders.subtitle: Publisher vs. project
founders.description: This page describes the project you are using. The legal publisher and founding team — the organization that ships and maintains the Ring stack — has a dedicated story with contacts and gratitude.
founders.ctaHint: Origin story, legal entity, and team contacts
founders.contactSubtitle: Architect behind this Ring deployment — Sonoratek LLC & Ringdom

goals.title: What we are building toward
goals.subtitle: Goals for this deployment

connect.title: Connect the right people
connect.description: Profiles, entities, and messaging so members find collaborators faster than scattered chats and spreadsheets.

opportunities.title: Make opportunities visible
opportunities.description: Structured listings, matching, and notifications so relevant work surfaces without noise.

sovereignty.title: Own your stack
sovereignty.description: Self-hosted, white-label, and configurable — evolve the product on your timeline, not a SaaS roadmap.

goals.roadmapDescription: See shipped capabilities, token economy plans, and documentation milestones for this Ring deployment.

audience.title: Who this is for
audience.subtitle: Typical participants
items: Founders and operators building a niche community or marketplace
Members looking for collaborators, vendors, or local expertise
Organizations publishing entities, opportunities, and news
Contributors extending modules (store, Web3, AI matching) as needed

gettingStarted.title: How to get started
gettingStarted.subtitle: First steps on this site
steps: Create an account and complete your profile
Browse entities and opportunities relevant to you
Follow or message members you want to work with
Post an opportunity or entity when you are ready to contribute
Explore docs and settings to tune notifications and privacy

capabilities.title: What you can do here
capabilities.description: Ring combines community profiles, opportunity matching, optional store and Web3 modules, and AI-assisted discovery — enable only what this deployment needs.

sidebar.platformInfoDesc: Ring Platform is an open-source solution for building decentralized communities and marketplaces.
sidebar.needHelpDesc: Have questions? Check our documentation or reach out.
